TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tjacupu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 48 buwan, 116 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 104 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 12 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 87%, Amis 1%, Bunun 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Tjacupu hya' ga Seqalapit. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tjacupu ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč tja ¶~ ®upu …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu tajő≤u …£o (*awu), kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, amis~…ē *%, ő≤unun *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkjańßu Ē na tja ¶~ ®upu ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēeqalapit. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan qalaŇč tja ¶~ ®upu …£a uŇčat pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Tjacupu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 48 buwan, 116 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 104 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 12 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 87%, Amis 1%, Bunun 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Tjacupu hya' ga Seqalapit. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tjacupu ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
